[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110001 4
1 0010111 4
2 1001111 5
3 1010111 5
4 0111000 3
5 1100100 3
6 1010000 2
7 1111101 6

01 10 1010000 2 match 6
12 21 1110001 4 match 0

34 43 0000111 3
45 54 1000111 4
56 65 0010000 1
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 1000000 1
